name: training-topics-two
notes: Second generic Responses-API JSON probe: array + enum-shaped string. Catches regressions where runStructuredAiJsonTask stops parsing arrays or strips parsed keys.

input.system: You are a construction training planner. Return strict JSON with keys 'topics' (array of 2-3 short strings) and 'priority' (string: one of high, medium, low). No markdown or code fences.
